sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ لَيْلَى فَتَاةً صَغِيرَةً تُحِبُّ الْقِصَصَ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ أَيِّ شَيْءٍ آخَرَ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je bila mala djevojčica koja je voljela priče više od svega.
sentences.translationEn: Layla was a little girl who loved stories more than anything else.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَقْرَأُ فِي غُرْفَتِهَا، وَفِي الْحَدِيقَةِ، وَحَتَّى تَحْتَ الْغِطَاءِ بِضَوْءِ الْمِصْبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Čitala je u svojoj sobi, u bašči, pa čak i ispod pokrivača uz svjetlost lampe.
sentences.translationEn: She would read in her room, in the garden, and even under the blanket by lamplight.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الشَّخْصِيَّاتُ فِي الرِّوَايَاتِ أَصْدِقَاءَهَا الْحَقِيقِيِّينَ.
sentences.translation: Likovi u romanima bili su njeni pravi prijatelji.
sentences.translationEn: The characters in novels were her true friends.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَنْتَهِي مِنْ قِصَّةٍ، تَحْزَنُ لِأَنَّهَا تُوَدِّعُ عَالَمًا أَحَبَّتْهُ.
sentences.translation: Kad bi završila neku priču, rastužila bi se jer se oprašta od svijeta koji je zavoljela.
sentences.translationEn: When she finished a story, she would feel sad because she was saying goodbye to a world she had come to love.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ تَفْتَحُ كِتَابًا جَدِيدًا وَتَبْدَأُ رِحْلَةً أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Zatim bi otvorila novu knjigu i krenula na novo putovanje.
sentences.translationEn: Then she would open a new book and begin another journey.
